title: Anemagrostis spica-venti
taxonomy: Anemagrostis spica-venti is classified as a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the genus Anemagrostis. The classification of Anemagrostis spica-venti is further categorized under the tribe Poeae. This grass species is native to certain parts of Europe and is often found in moist environments. Further research is needed to confirm its exact classification and taxonomic position within the plant kingdom.
uses: Anemagrostis spica-venti, also known as the Bent Grass, is a type of grass with various potential medicinal uses.
